title: canary native-probe leg + A/B protocol update (D3 evidence, V1-V3)
action: Per D3/D4: add a probe mode to canary_codex.mjs that, INSIDE the per-run isolated CODEX_HOME only, writes [features] multi_agent_v2=true + hide_spawn_agent_metadata=false into the isolated config.toml, runs a minimal spawn attempt carrying model/reasoning_effort/fork_turns:'none', and records the observed outcome (accepted/refused/fields-absent + PreToolUse tool_input envelope shape for V3) as a version-scoped evidence report at docs/history/codex-native-transport/reports/probe-evidence.md plus the machine record cnt-2 defined. Skip-guard unchanged (no codex binary => exit 0, suite stays green). Update docs/decisions/ab-tiny-protocol.md with the probe leg. Answering V1 NO is a valid green outcome — the evidence is the deliverable, not a passing override. PROBE EVIDENCE FOLD (decision daa01646): V1 already CONFIRMED-YES live (override spawn accepted with multi_agent_v2 forced; SpawnAgentArgs whitelist captured in .bee/spikes/codex-native-transport/evidence/ — reuse those exact invocation shapes). V2: use [features] multi_agent_v2 = true, and when setting hide_spawn_agent_metadata use the nested table WITH explicit enabled = true (table without enabled does NOT flip — proven). V3 IS THIS CELL'S CRITICAL DELIVERABLE and MUST be observed through an onboard_bee-built fixture (full hook chain, canary pattern) — the hand-rolled single-hook probe never fired despite active bypass (divergence from capability-matrix D1 documented in probe-v1v3.md); do not repeat the hand-rolled approach. cnt-4's cap is gated on this cell's V3 observation.

truths: flags are written only under the isolated CODEX_HOME path (asserted in test)
probe outcome recorded even when negative
skip-guard keeps CI green without codex
prohibitions: no write outside the isolated CODEX_HOME
no fabricated evidence — observed output only

trace.outcome: Added --probe-selftest (offline TOML-isolation invariant check, dave's scaffold wired to argv + fixed a live duplicate-key TOML bug found while proving it) and --probe (real V1/V3 native-transport probe leg: onboarded-hook-chain fixture, injected envelope-capture hook, live override spawn, writeNativeTransportProbe machine record) to canary_codex.mjs. Ran --probe live on this host's codex-cli 0.144.6: multi_agent_v2 force-enables correctly (V2 reconfirmed), but the override tool schema itself is now REFUSED at the API level ('Function collaboration.spawn_agent is reserved for use by this model') even on a plain no-override turn — a genuine regression from 0.144.4's CONFIRMED-YES, so V1 flips to REFUSED and V3 stays UNOBSERVED (turn never reaches tool execution) on this build; D4 isolation independently confirmed (real CODEX_HOME config.toml byte-identical, verified via md5sum outside the script too). Documented in reports/probe-evidence.md and a new probe-leg-protocol section in docs/decisions/ab-tiny-protocol.md.
